title: Metrosideros halconensis
taxonomy: Metrosideros halconensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to the Philippines and is also known as Philippine rose myrtle. The plant belongs to the genus Metrosideros, which comprises several species of trees and shrubs found in tropical and subtropical regions. Metrosideros halconensis is a small tree or shrub that is valued for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The classification of Metrosideros halconensis is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its distinctive red flowers and glossy leaves.
